scripts.build: npm run build --workspace omega-pac && npm run build --workspace omega-target && npm run build --workspace omega-web && npm run build:ts && node build.js
scripts.dev: npm link omega-target && npm link omega-web && npm link omega-pac
scripts.release: npm run build --workspace omega-pac && npm run build --workspace omega-target && npm run build --workspace omega-web && npm run build:ts && node build.js release
